fixed40_disjoint.label: Fixed 40 disjoint short form
fixed40_disjoint.model_basis: Per-condition 1D 2PL calibrations: mod_hit and mod_cr; item score = discrimination a within each condition.
fixed40_disjoint.selection_rule: Best 40-item no-overlap D-study configuration: Disjoint — Hit-first, (i) Top-a, Hit 20 + CR 20.

extended70_disjoint.label: Extended 70 disjoint adaptive pool
extended70_disjoint.model_basis: Per-condition 1D 2PL calibrations: mod_hit and mod_cr; item score = Fisher information at theta = 0 within each condition.
extended70_disjoint.selection_rule: Best no-overlap unrestricted-length D-study configuration: Disjoint — Hit-first, (iii) Top info at theta=0, Hit 35 + CR 35.
